import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./PathologyPage.css"; const PathologyPage = () => { const [selectedCheckup, setSelectedCheckup] = useState(null); const fullBodyCheckups = [ { title: "Full Body Checkup - Essential", price: "₹1599", discount: "70% Off", details: { parameters: 4, tests: [ "HBsAg (ECLIA)", "VDRL Qualitative", "Hepatitis C Virus antibodies (Anti HCV)", "1 other test", ], time: "12 hours", }, }, { title: "Full Body Checkup - Advanced", price: "₹2699", discount: "68% Off", details: { parameters: 6, tests: [ "Blood Sugar (Fasting)", "Liver Function Test", "Kidney Function Test", "Thyroid Profile", "Cholesterol", "Vitamin D", ], time: "24 hours", }, }, { title: "Ultra Full Body Checkup - Male", price: "₹11999", discount: "66% Off", details: { parameters: 10, tests: [ "CBC", "HbA1c", "Lipid Profile", "LFT", "KFT", "Thyroid Profile", "Iron Studies", "Vitamin D & B12", "PSA", "Urine Routine", ], time: "36 hours", }, }, ]; const handleViewDetails = (item) => { setSelectedCheckup(item); }; const handleClose = () => { setSelectedCheckup(null); }; return (

{fullBodyCheckups.map((item, index) => (

{item.title}

{item.discount}
))}
{/* Modal / Popup */} {selectedCheckup && (
e.stopPropagation()} >

{selectedCheckup.title}

{selectedCheckup.details.parameters} parameters included:

    {selectedCheckup.details.tests.map((test, i) => (
  • {test}
    • ))}

Reports Within {selectedCheckup.details.time}

)}
); }; export default PathologyPage;
